action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current mission time, weather alerts, and identifies status of grid sectors (e.g., Unexplored).

action_set_definitions.name: get_unit_manifest
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all available rescue units including their ID, type (aerial/ground), current coordinates, and current fuel/energy percentage.

action_set_definitions.name: get_casualty_data
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of known victims, their IDs, coordinates, and health status (e.g., life-threatening).

action_set_definitions.name: scan_sector
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a remote scan of a specific sector to identify the presence, ID, and coordinates of missing persons without requiring physical unit presence.

sector_id.description: The ID of the sector to scan.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_mission_feasibility
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the estimated travel time and remaining fuel percentage for a unit to travel from its current location to a target, and then back to the ICP at [0, 0].

action_set_definitions.name: execute_dispatch
action_set_definitions.description: Dispatches a unit to a target location to perform an action (EVACUATE or SEARCH) and then return to ICP.

action_set_definitions.name: log_mission_constraint_failure
action_set_definitions.description: Used to report when a mission objective cannot be met due to safety or time constraints.

reason.description: Explanation of why the objective is impossible (e.g., insufficient fuel).

state_description.mission_time_elapsed: Total minutes elapsed since the start of the mission.
state_description.active_units: List of available rescue units including their status, current coordinates, and energy/fuel levels.
state_description.identified_victims: Information about victims that have been localized but not yet rescued.
state_description.environmental_conditions: Current weather and terrain constraints affecting the mission.
state_description.search_grid_status: Mapping of grid sectors to their search status (e.g., Unexplored, In_Progress, Cleared).
